custom_status: What's on your mind — shows as standalone text.
When set, this takes priority over activity_type.
Leave empty to use activity_type instead.
NOTE: Discord bots can only show one activity at a time,
so custom_status and activity_type are mutually exclusive.
streaming_url: Any other URL (e.g. a Discord invite) → clickable link, no badge.
_docs.bio: Set in Discord Developer Portal → your app → General Information → Description.
_docs.commands: All slash commands appear automatically in the bot profile Commands tab.
